body.title: tests/inference/test_inference_tier_escalation.py: 3 tests red (no live source in test env)
body.intention: I intend that the tier-escalation tests pass hermetically without live providers.
body.description:
**Problem:** Pre-existing (confirmed RED on HEAD 6763b897 independent of T-proxy-source-kind): tests/inference/test_inference_tier_escalation.py::TestEscalationCeiling::test_hop_0_passes_through and TestEscalationHandoff::{test_hop_1_prepends_summary_to_system, test_hop_1_no_prior_attempt_no_prepend} fail with 'complete inference failure — no live source for task_class=worker'. They appear to exercise dispatch() routing without registering an available stub source, so in a provider-less test env route() returns None and the chokepoint fires. Likely need a registered MagicMock source (see test_inference_device.py::test_dispatch_via_rules_engine pattern) or @pytest.mark.integration.
**Affected files:** tests/inference/test_inference_tier_escalation.py (test setup only, likely).
**Scope boundary:** IN — make the 3 tests hermetic (stub a source) or mark integration. OUT — changing dispatch/escalation behavior.
**Test plan:** the 3 named tests pass with no live Ollama/OR; full tests/inference/ green.
**Completion criteria:** tests/inference/test_inference_tier_escalation.py green hermetically.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: SUBSUMED by T-inference-pin-gate-enforce (commit 1bfbc843). The 3 tests it names (test_hop_0_passes_through, test_hop_1_prepends_summary_to_system, test_hop_1_no_prior_attempt_no_prepend) are GREEN at HEAD — verified now (3 passed). Root cause was the 'openai/gpt-4o-mini' default model blocking the legacy path + a partial _make_device() lacking _monitor; both fixed during the domain-routing batch (default→'' in migrate-pinners 258168b8; _monitor added to the fixture in the pin-gate commit).
body.unproven_reason: Proof is the 3 green tests at HEAD (a hollow build fails them), but the fix shipped under another ticket's commit — this is a duplicate-close, not a fresh proof-emitter run.
